text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are we really going there?! That French
restaurant is super famous!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What, is it too fancy for you? I could make a
reservation elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, that's definitely not at all what I mean! It's
only, well...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm kind of worried I'll make a mistake with my
table manners...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Now this is new... You're normally so gung
ho with everything.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But, King, this time I'll be dining with you. What if I embarrass myself... Aaagh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Still, we'll just have to take our chances. And
while we're eating, I'll hammer some proper
manners into that thick head of yours.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry. Just have a first-rate celebration
and enjoy yourself. Happy birthday, Kawakami.
